SharpClay
Table of Contents

Enum ElementConfigType

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Specifies the type of layout configuration applied to a UI element. This configuration determines which rendering, sizing, or layout rules Clay applies to the element.

public enum ElementConfigType : byte

Fields

Aspect = 4

Enforces a specific aspect ratio on the element.

Border = 1

Applies a border layout config, drawing borders on one or more edges.

Clip = 3

Clips child elements when they exceed the boundaries of this element.

Custom = 7

Applies a custom layout configuration or renderer for custom elements.

Floating = 2

Allows the element to float dynamically relative to other elements (absolute positioning).

Image = 5

Specifies that the element renders an image.

None = 0

No configuration type is set.

Shared = 8

Uses a shared style or configuration block.

Text = 6

Specifies that the element renders text.

Made with docfx
